testsuite.name: agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClientTest

testcase.name: commit flushes buffer and executes all buffered calls
multiple buffered calls accumulate in buffer
speculative invocation buffers call without executing
non-speculative invocation passes through to real client

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:25.793 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 1 tools 08:31:25.793 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Began speculation buffer: spec-1 08:31:25.794 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Buffered tool call: web_search (speculation: spec-1) 08:31:25.794 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Buffered tool call: web_search (speculation: spec-1) 08:31:25.794 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Rolled back speculation spec-1: discarded 2 buffered calls 08:31:25.795 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 1 tools 08:31:25.795 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Began speculation buffer: spec-1 08:31:25.795 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Buffered tool call: web_search (speculation: spec-1) 08:31:25.795 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Began speculation buffer: spec-2 08:31:25.795 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Buffered tool call: web_search (speculation: spec-2) invoked: success=true 08:31:25.796 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.BufferedMCPClient -- Rolled back speculation spec-2: discarded 1 buffered calls 08:31:25.796 [Test worker] INFO
